title: BEZGAR TB141 Remote Control Cars - 1:14 Scale RC Car, 2WD 20KM/H All-Terrains Toy Off Road Vehicle Monster Truck with Two Rechargeable Batteries for Boys Kids Adults and Girls, Red
features: 【ABS CHASSIS AND REINFORCED BODY】The whole chassis of the remote control car is made of ABS plastic and the main body is made of alloy material. All these properties give the truck a better collision resistance to prolong its life span.

【STABLE PERFORMANCE EXPERIENCE】This is a toy grade rc car. The 1/14 scale makes it easier to control, it can go up to 20Km/h at full speed with a brushed built-in motor. Its powerful performance makes this truck an ideal toy for boys and girls up 8 years old.

【USB CHARGE AND 2 RECHARGEABLE BATTERY】The USB charger for the battery is convenient to charge and has several functions such as overcharge protection and short circle protection. And 2 packs original battery allow you to experience a longer gaming time.

【NO DELAY RTR REMOTE CONTROLLER】Easy-to-use non-interference remote controller with 2.4GHz frequency makes the car always ready to run and has non-jamming function. It is a great off-road monster truck for indoor and outdoor.

【PERFECT GIFT FOR KIDS】A cool toy grade remote control monster truck gift, an ideal birthday or any occasion gift. If you are looking for an exciting present, then you will love our radio controlled cars. Everyone can join in the BEZGAR fun.

More Collision Resistant The car body adopts aluminum alloy material, which provides a robust structure for the RC truck to withstand dropping and collision. Better Racing Experience With four shock absorbers, they can take in small bumps with ease and resist bottoming out over large jumps. Challenge Multiple Terrains These rubber tires have better elasticity and boast a stronger grip, which enables the RC car to conquer various terrains. Next page TB141 BEZGAR Toy Grade Series 1:14 Scale 1:14 2 x 7.4V 800mAh Battery 2 x 6.0V 800mAh 35-45 minutes Run Time 35-45 minutes USB charge Charge Method USB charge 2.5 hours Charge Time 2.5 hours / Stunts / 1:14 Scale 1:14 2 x 7.4V 800mAh Battery 1 x 3.7V 600mAh 35-45 minutes Run Time 20-25 minutes USB charge Charge Method USB charge 2.5 hours Charge Time 2.5 hours / Stunts Double-sided driving 1:14 Scale 1:16 2 x 7.4V 800mAh Battery 1 x 3.7V 500mAh 35-45 minutes Run Time 20-25 minutes USB charge Charge Method USB charge 2.5 hours Charge Time 1.5 hours / Stunts 360-degree Rotation 1:14 Scale 1:30 2 x 7.4V 800mAh Battery 1 x 3.7V 500mAh 35-45 minutes Run Time 20-25 minutes USB charge Charge Method USB charge 2.5 hours Charge Time 1.5 hours / Stunts 360° Flip & Spinning Previous page TB142 Learn More TD141 Learn More TD161S Learn More TD202MINI Learn More Next page How long does the battery get fully charged? How long does a fully charged battery last? Commonly, it takes around 2hrs to charge a battery fully and promises a 15-20mins running time. The running time can be added to 30-40mins with two batteries. I have three kids. Can they run the RC car at the same time without interfering with each other? Our transmitter adpots the 2.4Ghz non-interfering technology. It provides a stable signal and allows to compete with multiple players at the same time. How do I know when the battery is fully charged? When you charging the RC car, the indicator becomes red. While the battery is fully charged, the red light goes out. Do this RC truck a full-terrain truck as advertised? Yes. But if you want to prolong the RC truck's life time, please avoid running on the grass or beaches frequently. What should I do if I want to get some parts and support from you? You could contact our support team via website support.bezgar.com or make a phone call to us via (+1（833）325-1118).
